original: a poster of Kiro, showing off in the nude
context: <<POS:05964032>> e.description='a poster of Kiro, showing off in the nude'

original: Using this item will install the poster as a decoration on your ship.\n\nAccording to the signatures on the back, Blizzmaster created this image. Sweet!
context: <<POS:05964086>> e.tooltip='Using this item will install the poster as a decoration on y'

original: You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...
context: <<POS:05964582>> output("You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...\n")

original: This poster has been unlocked for decorating! You may hang it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.
translation: 这张海报已解锁，可用于装饰！你可以通过飞船特定位置的“装饰”按钮将其挂起，例如你的床铺、登船坡道、船员安保控制台或导航终端。
context: <> output("This poster has been unlocked for decorating! You may hang it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.")

original: The poster you swiped from the Kui Country Bar and Grill onsens hangs in your ship, proudly displaying a very nude image of a very excited Kiro Tamahime."+({var0}.isCrewAndNotBimbo()?" [kiro.name] never fails to smile slyly whenever she sees it. She knows where you got it from.":"")
context: <<POS:05965264>> <<VARS:var0=kiro>> output("The poster you swiped from the Kui Country Bar and Grill onsens hangs in your ship, proudly displaying a very nude image of a very excited Kiro Tamahime."+(kiro.isCrewAndNotBimbo()?" [kiro.name] never fails to smile slyly whenever she sees it. She knows where you got it from.":""))
